expression.intent: Add a governor verb that checks if context.target is in an allowedVerbs array in props. If allowedVerbs is missing, allow all. Return { allowed: boolean }.

expression.payload: function(context) { let allowedVerbs = context.props.allowedVerbs; if (!allowedVerbs) { return { allowed: true }; } return { allowed: allowedVerbs.includes(context.target) }; }

expression.intent: Add a governor verb that checks if context.target is in an allowedVerbs array in props. If allowedVerbs is missing, allow all. Return { allowed: boolean }.

expression.payload: try { const props = context ? context.props : null; const target = context ? context.target : null; const list = props ? props.allowedVerbs : null; if (Array.isArray(list) && typeof target === 'string') { result = { allowed: list.includes(target) }; } else { result = { allowed: true }; } } catch (e) { fabric.log('Error in govern:', e.message); result = { error: e.message }; }
